parsed.production_notes: The video combines standard human-recorded footage of the two main characters with footage of a presenter who has a prominent CGI/VFX robotic neck piece, suggesting a mix of real acting and digital effects.

characters.appearance: A young man in his early 20s with a slim build and a medium brown complexion. He has short, styled black hair, a well-defined mustache, and a light beard. His facial features are sharp.
characters.wardrobe: A short-sleeved t-shirt with wide horizontal stripes in teal and dark blue, paired with dark grey jeans. He wears a silver-colored chain bracelet on his left wrist.
characters.demeanor: Initially casual and questioning, becomes surprised, and finally appears happy and decisive.

characters.appearance: A young woman in her early 20s with a slim build and a fair complexion. She has long, dark brown, wavy hair, typically parted in the middle. She has soft, delicate facial features.
characters.wardrobe: A long, magenta-colored dress with short puffed sleeves and a subtle white embroidered pattern on the bodice.
characters.demeanor: Appears thoughtful and concerned initially, then becomes confident and persuasive.

characters.appearance: A man in his late 20s with a medium build and a fair complexion. He has thick, perfectly coiffed black hair and is clean-shaven with a hint of stubble. He has a friendly, trustworthy smile.
characters.wardrobe: A black collared shirt, with a prominent and futuristic-looking silver and black robotic collar piece around his neck.
characters.demeanor: Professional, charismatic, and persuasive, speaking directly to the audience.

scenes.setting: An outdoor porch or balcony during the day. A plain off-white wall is in the background, with a reddish-brown railing. Lush green trees and palm fronds are visible beyond the railing under a bright sky.

panels.panel_visual_description: In a bright, outdoor daytime setting on a porch, Character A and Character B are having a conversation. Character A, a young man, leans casually against a railing, holding a small orange cup. He is turned towards Character B, speaking with an expressive face. Character B, a young woman, stands facing him, holding a black smartphone in her hands and listening intently with a serious expression. The background shows a simple wall and green foliage.

scenes.visual_description: A medium shot of a young man (Character A) and a young woman (Character B) talking on a sunny porch. He leans against a railing while she holds a phone. They are engaged in a serious conversation. Subtitles in Kannada appear at the bottom of the screen, translating their dialogue.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: ನೀವು ದಿನಕ್ಕೆ 30 ರೂಪಾಯಿ ಏನಕ್ಕೆ spend ಮಾಡ್ತೀರಾ? ಟೀ, ಸ್ನ್ಯಾಕ್ಸ್, scroll ಮಾಡಿ ಮುಗಿಸ್ತೀರಾ. [Why do you spend 30 rupees a day? On tea, snacks, you finish it by scrolling.]
Character B says: ಆದ್ರೆ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲಿಯೋದಕ್ಕೆ ಅಂತ ಬಂದ್ರೆ ತುಂಬಾ expensive ಆಗಿರುತ್ತೆ ಅಂತ think ಮಾಡ್ತೀವಿ. [But when it comes to learning English, we think it will be very expensive.]
Character A says: ಕೋಚಿಂಗ್ ಫೀಸ್, ಟ್ಯೂಟರ್ ಎಲ್ಲವೂ ತುಂಬಾ ಕಾಸ್ಟ್ಲಿ ಅನ್ಸುತ್ತೆ. [Coaching fees, tutor, everything feels very costly.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
ನೀವು ದಿನಕ್ಕೆ 30 ರೂಪಾಯಿ ಏನಕ್ಕೆ spend ಮಾಡ್ತೀರಾ? ಟೀ, ಸ್ನ್ಯಾಕ್ಸ್, scroll ಮಾಡಿ ಮುಗಿಸ್ತೀರಾ. (Why do you spend 30 rupees a day? On tea, snacks, you finish it by scrolling.)
ಆದ್ರೆ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲಿಯೋದಕ್ಕೆ ಅಂತ ಬಂದ್ರೆ ತುಂಬಾ expensive ಆಗಿರುತ್ತೆ ಅಂತ think ಮಾಡ್ತೀವಿ. (But when it comes to learning English, we think it will be very expensive.)
ಕೋಚಿಂಗ್ ಫೀಸ್, ಟ್ಯೂಟರ್ ಎಲ್ಲವೂ ತುಂಬಾ ಕಾಸ್ಟ್ಲಿ ಅನ್ಸುತ್ತೆ. (Coaching fees, tutor, everything feels very costly.)

scenes.setting: Top panel: The same outdoor porch. Bottom panel: A warm, indoor office or study with a blurred background featuring a window and a bookshelf.
scenes.camera: split-screen: medium shot (top) and medium close-up (bottom)

panels.panel_visual_description: On the sunny outdoor porch, Character A and Character B now stand side-by-side, looking forward towards the camera with neutral, listening expressions. The bright daylight illuminates them.

In a medium close-up, Character C, a well-groomed presenter with a robotic neck piece, sits in an office chair. He looks directly at the camera and speaks with a friendly and engaging smile. The background is a softly lit, out-of-focus office with a bookshelf and a window.

scenes.visual_description: The screen is split horizontally. The top panel shows Character A and B standing on the porch, looking at the camera. The bottom panel shows Character C, the presenter, speaking directly to the viewer from an office setting. A brand logo for 'SpeakX' briefly appears. Subtitles for Character C's speech are displayed at the bottom of the lower panel.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character C says: ನೀವು 30 rupees ಸ್ನ್ಯಾಕ್ಸ್ ಮೇಲೆ ಖರ್ಚು ಮಾಡ್ತೀರಾ? ಅದು 5 ನಿಮಿಷ ಮಾತ್ರ ಇರುತ್ತೆ. ಯಾಕೆ 29 rupees skill ಮೇಲೆ ಖರ್ಚು ಮಾಡಬಾರದು? ಅದು ಲೈಫ್ ಟೈಮ್ ಇರುತ್ತೆ. SpeakX ಅಲ್ಲಿ ಸಿಗುತ್ತೆ. ಏಳು ದಿನಗಳ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕೋಚಿಂಗ್, daily ಸ್ಪೀಕಿಂಗ್ ಪ್ರಾಕ್ಟೀಸ್, ಬೇಸಿಕ್ ಇಂದ ಕಾನ್ಫಿಡೆಂಟ್ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ವರೆಗೆ. [You spend 30 rupees on snacks? That lasts only 5 minutes. Why not spend 29 rupees on a skill? That will be for a lifetime. You'll get it on SpeakX. Seven days of English coaching, daily speaking practice, from basic to confident English.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
ನೀವು 30 rupees ಸ್ನ್ಯಾಕ್ಸ್ ಮೇಲೆ ಖರ್ಚು ಮಾಡ್ತೀರಾ? ಅದು 5 ನಿಮಿಷ ಮಾತ್ರ ಇರುತ್ತೆ. (You spend 30 rupees on snacks? That lasts only 5 minutes.)
ಯಾಕೆ 29 Rupees Skill ಮೇಲೆ ಖರ್ಚು ಮಾಡಬಾರದು? (Why not spend 29 Rupees on a Skill?)
ಅದು ಲೈಫ್ ಟೈಮ್ ಇರುತ್ತೆ. (That will be for a lifetime.)
SpeakX
ಏಳು ದಿನಗಳ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕೋಚಿಂಗ್ (Seven days of English coaching)
Daily ಸ್ಪೀಕಿಂಗ್ ಪ್ರಾಕ್ಟೀಸ್ (Daily speaking practice)
ಬೇಸಿಕ್ ಇಂದ ಕಾನ್ಫಿಡೆಂಟ್ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ವರೆಗೆ (From basic to confident English)

panels.panel_visual_description: Back on the sunny porch, Character A looks surprised and gestures with his hand as he speaks to Character B. He holds a small white container with an orange lid. Character B stands beside him, holding her phone, and replies with a knowing, confident expression, making a small gesture with her hand. They look at each other and then back towards the camera.

scenes.visual_description: The scene returns to the single medium shot of Character A and B on the porch. Character A expresses disbelief at the low price, and Character B explains the long-term value of the skill. Subtitles are present at the bottom.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Only 29 rupees ಗೆ ಫುಲ್ ಲರ್ನಿಂಗ್? [Full learning for only 29 rupees?]
Character B says: ಟೀ finish ಆಗುತ್ತೆ, ಸ್ನ್ಯಾಕ್ಸ್ finish ಆಗುತ್ತೆ, ಆದ್ರೆ skill ಲೈಫ್ ಟೈಮ್ ಜೊತೆ ಇರುತ್ತೆ. [Tea gets finished, snacks get finished, but a skill stays with you for a lifetime.]
Character A says: ನಾನು wrong things ಮೇಲೆ money waste ಮಾಡ್ತಿದ್ದೆ ಅನ್ಸುತ್ತೆ. [I feel I was wasting money on the wrong things.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
ಕೇವಲ 29 rupees ಗೆ (For only 29 rupees)
ಟೀ finish ಆಗುತ್ತೆ, ಸ್ನ್ಯಾಕ್ಸ್ finish ಆಗುತ್ತೆ, (Tea gets finished, snacks get finished,)
ಆದ್ರೆ skill ಲೈಫ್ ಟೈಮ್ ಜೊತೆ ಇರುತ್ತೆ. (but a skill stays with you for a lifetime.)
ನಾನು wrong things ಮೇಲೆ money waste ಮಾಡ್ತಿದ್ದೆ ಅನ್ಸುತ್ತೆ. (I feel I was wasting money on the wrong things.)

scenes.setting: Split-screen with the porch (top) and office (bottom), then transitions to just the porch.

panels.panel_visual_description: On the porch, Character A and B stand looking forward, listening with positive expressions.
In his office, Character C smiles warmly and delivers his final lines to the camera, gesturing slightly with his hands.

scenes.visual_description: The scene starts with the same split-screen as before, with Character C delivering a call to action. It then cuts to a single medium shot of Character A and B on the porch. They are now smiling and looking directly at the camera, with Character A raising his small cup as if in a toast. They deliver the final line together. Subtitles are present throughout.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character C says: Start small, learn big.
Character A & B says: We are starting SpeakX today.
Unknown speaker: 2000, 3000, ಅಲ್ಲ 29. Finish, finish, finish, finish. [Not 2000, 3000, but 29. Finish, finish, finish, finish.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
Start small, learn big.
We are starting speak X today
2000, 3000, ಅಲ್ಲ 29. Finish, finish, finish, finish. (Not 2000, 3000, but 29. Finish, finish, finish, finish.)
